label: 第244話
source_locator: 単行本27巻 目次 p.149
summary_short: 新宿では日車と虎杖が宿儺へ挑む。高専側は宿儺を日車の領域で裁き、処刑人の剣を発生させる作戦を実行する。
summary_full: 新宿では日車と虎杖が宿儺へ挑む。高専側は宿儺を日車の領域で裁き、処刑人の剣を発生させる作戦を実行する。新宿では日車の領域で宿儺を渋谷の大量殺人について再審する計画が始まる。日車は虎杖と宿儺を共同被告として扱い、真犯人である宿儺を法廷へ引き出す。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Round three of the 人外魔境新宿決戦 features 日車寛見 and 虎杖悠仁 against 宿儺 ! 日車 volunteered himself to go out after 鹿紫雲一 , but 悠仁 accompanies him with a plan to ensure that 宿儺 answers for his crimes and stands trial within 誅伏賜死 .
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: As 日車 and 悠仁 descend from the skies, 宿儺 watches them with a grin. When the sorcerers were plotting prior to the battle of the strongest , 日下部篤也 reiterated the plan to have 高羽史彦 distract 羂索 to allow 乙骨憂太 to kill him once 五条 was confirmed to have lost. He also reminded 憂太 to rush back to 新宿 afterward. 日下部 opened the floor to discuss who to send to battle 宿儺 if 五条 is defeated. 鹿紫雲一 suggested that everyone should attack 宿儺 together, but insisted on going first. 日下部 retorted his statement, as there would no point in sending people who have no chance of survival or creating an opening to the frontlines. An example is 三輪霞 , who was no longer able to swing a katana due to the 縛り she made in 渋谷 when trying to hit 羂索 . The jujutsu sorcerers discuss their plan to fight 宿儺. 日下部 speculated that sorcerers could use 呪力 to reject the merging with 天元 , and some people could still possibly survive even if 宿儺 and 羂索 achieved their goals and created a monster from the merger to wreak havoc on the world. He believed that since 羂索 was hunting down remaining players in the 死滅回游 to end it, the sorcerers could survive longer if only 宿儺 remained, even for only a few days. 加茂憲紀 stood up and declared his intent to flee overseas with his family instead of participating in the battle. 日下部 accepted his apology and acknowledged that not many people were well-equipped for the upcoming fight. 悠仁 thanked Noritoshi for teaching him about 赤血操術 in place of 脹相 due to his inability. 日下部 listed the requirements for the combatants: they must be able to use 反転術式 or do not mind dying. He strongly recommended anyone who did not fulfill any of the requisites not participate or only provide support. 日車寛見 volunteered to fight 宿儺 after 鹿紫雲, as his 術式 can "confiscate" 宿儺's technique. This irritated 鹿紫雲 because it sounded like 日車 was already assuming he'll lose to 宿儺. 秤金次 calmed him down as 日車 continued. If 宿儺 received the death penalty from 誅伏賜死 , 日車 could battle him with the 処刑人の剣. While he acknowledged that the 処刑人の剣's ability to kill with one hit would be useful, 日下部 was skeptical of whether a verdict for confiscation or death could be ruled. 悠仁 confirmed that 日車 cannot control what charges ジャッジマン could bring against 宿儺. 日車 volunteering to fight 宿儺 after 鹿紫雲. 悠仁 informed 日車 of the three times 宿儺 possessed his body: at Sugisawa Municipal High School #3 , at Eishu Juvenile Detention Center, and at 渋谷 . Given 宿儺's actions that led to casualties at the detention center and 渋谷, as well as possibly more crimes committed while possessing 伏黒恵 , 悠仁 believed that it was more than likely ジャッジマン could prosecute 宿儺 for a crime that could lead to a death penalty verdict. However, 日車 posited that this may not be the case. He summarized that 宿儺's crimes so far were: bodily injury to 悠仁 and attempted murder of 五条 at 悠仁's high school; attempted murder of 悠仁 and 恵 at the detention center; murder of 美々子 枷場 , 菜々子 枷場 and 重面春太 , attempted murder of numerous civilians, and arson of inhabited buildings at 渋谷; and finally bodily harm, attempted murder, or illegal possession of a dead body due to him taking over 恵, though the crime depends on 恵's condition. 悠仁 suggested that circumstances of the detention center were far worse due to the Finger Bearer , but 日車 believed it would be hard to accuse 宿儺 of crimes committed by his cursed objects since he didn't willfully aid or abet them. In a similar vein, it would be difficult to charge him with the murder of 吉野凪 . 日車 then listed out the varying punishments for a guilty verdict for murder depending on the severity, with capital punishment usually being guaranteed for the killing of two or more people. 悠仁 figures out a way to get 宿儺 the death penalty. 日車 believed that according to the Nagayama Standard, 宿儺 was impossible to rehabilitate based on the dangers he posed to society, which would lead to a death sentence normally. 日下部 understood what 日車 was implying, much to 三輪's surprise. 日下部 added that while the totality of 宿儺's crimes would result in a death penalty, 日車's 術式 tries each crime individually, which meant there was less than a thirty percent chance of 宿儺 being tried for a crime that would result in the death penalty. 日下部 also raised a second issue: the minor offenses attached to 宿儺's more major crimes. 日車 agreed, stating that ジャッジマン could prosecute 宿儺 for property damage or breaking and entering at 渋谷 rather than the massacre, which further lowers their chance of securing the death penalty. 悠仁 agreed with 日車, remembering the time ジャッジマン accused him of entering a pachinko parlor, which confirmed the possibility of ジャッジマン trying 宿儺 for minor offenses that 悠仁 committed while containing him. The jujutsu sorcerers begin their raid on 宿儺! 日車 added a third problem: 宿儺 could be charged with crimes from a thousand years ago. While 日下部 did not believe that could happen due to the statute of limitations, 日車 listed the changes in the legal system regarding the statute of limitations since the 平安時代. 悠仁 was confused about whether the statute of limitations could apply or not, and 日車 admitted that he himself was unsure, especially since the issue was further complicated by time prior to 宿儺's incarnation in modern times, which could be interpreted as him being "abroad", which would make him exempt from the statute of limitations. Since ジャッジマン is a 式神 connected to 日車's 術式, it would also accept whatever possible interpretation 日車 himself makes. Taking everything into account, 日下部 concluded that: 宿儺's crimes from a thousand years ago, ジャッジマン's own discretion, and 宿儺's countless potential crimes in the modern day meant the chances of ジャッジマン accusing him of crime that guaranteed a death penalty was extremely low. 秤 thanked 日車 for his willingness to participate nonetheless, as even confiscation would be a great help to the sorcerers. However, 日車 pointed out that he was unsure whether 十種影法術 術式 or 御廚子 would be confiscated since he never trialed someone with multiple techniques. Suddenly, 悠仁 proposed a way to guarantee the death penalty for 宿儺. "It's time for a do-over." Back in the present, several crows fly towards 宿儺, sent by 冥冥 to perform Bird Strike . 宿儺 strikes them down with a bolt of lightning using 神武解 . Observing this from afar, 冥冥 notes how sorcerers of 五条, 羂索, and 宿儺's caliber all chose to strike down the crows, surmising that Bird Strike is capable of doing damage to them if it hits. 冥冥 created an opening and expresses that she's played her part. 日車 strikes down on 宿儺 with his enlarged gavel but the latter avoids the smash. 悠仁 suddenly appears next to him, shattering the debris 日車's attack created and launching them at the King of Curses. 宿儺 attempts to use 神武解 again, but his arm is restrained by 日車's gavel, allowing 悠仁 to close in for a punch. Though he blocks 悠仁's fist with his other three hands, 宿儺 notices a strange effect from the punch. 日車 announces a re-trial for 悠仁 as he activates his 領域展開：誅伏賜死 , constructing the courtroom around the trio. 悠仁 was the one who proposed the idea for a third trial. By redoing his trial but including 宿儺, they could prosecute 宿儺 for the slaughter at 渋谷. 日車 realized the possibility of success from this option, deducing that he could continue the trial for the crime by adding 宿儺 as a codefendant, and even if he fails to convict 宿儺, this would nonetheless allow them to narrow down the crimes to when 宿儺 was possessing 悠仁. 内部 日車's domain, the lawyer gives his statement while holding the evidence submitted by ジャッジマン. He postulates that 悠仁's false confession during the second trial was driven by his guilt, and accuses 宿儺 of being the real culprit of the crime.

candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 新宿 新宿
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 呪術師s vs. 宿儺 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪具 神武解 日車寛見の術式 領域展開：誅伏賜死 冥冥の術式 黒鳥操術／神風／式神 ジャッジマン

key_events_verified_phase11: 新宿では日車と虎杖が宿儺へ挑む。
高専側は宿儺を日車の領域で裁き、処刑人の剣を発生させる作戦を実行する。
新宿では日車の領域で宿儺を渋谷の大量殺人について再審する計画が始まる。
日車は虎杖と宿儺を共同被告として扱い、真犯人である宿儺を法廷へ引き出す。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
